slots.title: Apple Inc. (AAPL)
slots.subtitle: Quarterly review — price action and revenue snapshot

commentary.heading: Trend
commentary.body: Primary uptrend intact above the 200-day average. Higher lows since the October trough; momentum **constructive** but extended.

commentary.heading: Levels
commentary.body:
- Support: $215 (prior breakout), $198 (200-dma)
- Resistance: $242 all-time high
- Risk/reward favors waiting for a pullback toward support

commentary.heading: Analyst view
commentary.body:
Growth re-accelerated on Services strength while Products stayed flat. Watch:
- Services mix now above one quarter of revenue
- Gross margin tailwind from mix shift
- FX drag fading into H2
